name: vortex-web
description: Vortex Music Player — real-time audio visualizer
author: joeyv23

scripts.build: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www && cp index.html vortex.js pcm-injector-worklet.js sw.js manifest.json icon-*.png og-image.png www/
scripts.cap:copy: npm run build && npx cap copy android
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build && npx cap sync android
